translation: Actions are judged by intentions. (Bukhari & Muslim)
The best among you are those who have the best manners.
The merciful are shown mercy by the Most Merciful.

arabic: من لا يشكر الناس لا يشكر الله
translation: He who does not thank people does not thank Allah.

arabic: لا يؤمن أحدكم حتى يحب لأخيه ما يحب لنفسه
translation: None of you truly believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself.
Your smile in the face of your brother is charity.
A good word is charity.

arabic: أحب الأعمال إلى الله أدومها وإن قل
translation: The most beloved deeds to Allah are those done consistently, even if small.
Allah is beautiful and loves beauty.
The best of you are those who learn the Qur'an and teach it.

arabic: من كان يؤمن بالله واليوم الآخر فليقل خيرا أو ليصمت
translation: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should speak good or remain silent.
Religion is sincerity and sincere advice.

arabic: المسلم من سلم المسلمون من لسانه ويده
translation: A Muslim is one from whose tongue and hand others are safe.

arabic: إن الله لا ينظر إلى صوركم ولكن ينظر إلى قلوبكم
translation: Allah does not look at your appearance but looks at your hearts.
Fear Allah wherever you are.

arabic: أحب الناس إلى الله أنفعهم للناس
translation: The most beloved people to Allah are those most beneficial to others.

arabic: من كان في حاجة أخيه كان الله في حاجته
translation: Whoever helps his brother, Allah will help him.

arabic: إن الله كتب الإحسان على كل شيء
translation: Allah has prescribed excellence in everything.
Make things easy and do not make them difficult.
There should be neither harm nor reciprocating harm.
Return trusts to those who entrusted them to you.
Modesty is part of faith.
Actions are judged by intentions.

arabic: أفضل الصدقة ما كان عن ظهر غنى
translation: The best charity is given from surplus wealth.

arabic: اطلبوا العلم من المهد إلى اللحد
translation: Seek knowledge from cradle to grave.

arabic: اليد العليا خير من اليد السفلى
translation: The upper hand is better than the lower hand.

arabic: من حسن إسلام المرء تركه ما لا يعنيه
translation: Part of a person's good Islam is leaving what does not concern him.

arabic: رحم الله امرأً سمحاً إذا باع وإذا اشترى
translation: May Allah have mercy on a man who is tolerant when he sells and buys.
The best of you are those best to their family.
O Allah, give replacement to the one who spends in charity.

arabic: المؤمن القوي خير وأحب إلى الله من المؤمن الضعيف
translation: The strong believer is better and more beloved to Allah than the weak believer.

arabic: لا يدخل الجنة من كان في قلبه مثقال ذرة من كبر
translation: He who has arrogance in his heart equal to a mustard seed will not enter Paradise.
One who guides to good is like the one who does it.
Patience is light.
Charity extinguishes sin.

arabic: أحب الأعمال إلى الله الصلاة على وقتها
translation: The most beloved deed to Allah is prayer at its proper time.
He who does not show mercy will not be shown mercy.

arabic: لا تزال طائفة من أمتي على الحق
translation: A group of my nation will remain upon truth.
What a good thing is righteous wealth in the hands of a righteous man.
Treat women kindly.

arabic: إن الله يحب إذا عمل أحدكم عملا أن يتقنه
translation: Allah loves that when one of you does a job, he perfects it.

arabic: طَلَبُ الْعِلْمِ فَرِيضَةٌ عَلَى كُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ
translation: Anas ibn Malik reported: The Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings be upon him) said: Seeking knowledge is an obligation upon every Muslim.

arabic: وَمَنْ سَلَكَ طَرِيقًا يَلْتَمِسُ فِيهِ عِلْمًا سَهَّلَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِهِ طَرِيقًا إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ وَمَا اجْتَمَعَ قَوْمٌ فِي بَيْتٍ مِنْ بُيُوتِ اللَّهِ يَتْلُونَ كِتَابَ اللَّهِ وَيَتَدَارَسُونَهُ بَيْنَهُمْ إِلاَّ نَزَلَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّكِينَةُ وَغَشِيَتْهُمُ الرَّحْمَةُ وَحَفَّتْهُمُ الْمَلاَئِكَةُ وَذَكَرَهُمُ اللَّهُ فِيمَنْ عِنْدَهُ
translation: Abu Huraira reported: The Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings be upon him) said: Whoever travels a path in search of knowledge, Allah will make easy for him a path to Paradise. People do not gather in the houses of Allah, reciting the Book of Allah and studying it together, but tranquility descends upon them, mercy covers them, angels surround them, and Allah mentions them to those near Him.

arabic: وَإِنَّ الْمَلَائِكَةَ لَتَضَعُ أَجْنِحَتَهَا رِضًا لِطَالِبِ الْعِلْمِ وَإِنَّ الْعَالِمَ لَيَسْتَغْفِرُ لَهُ مَنْ فِي السَّمَوَاتِ وَمَنْ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَالْحِيتَانُ فِي جَوْفِ الْمَاءِ وَإِنَّ فَضْلَ الْعَالِمِ عَلَى الْعَابِدِ كَفَضْلِ الْقَمَرِ لَيْلَةَ الْبَدْرِ عَلَى سَائِرِ الْكَوَاكِبِ وَإِنَّ الْعُلَمَاءَ وَرَثَةُ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَإِنَّ الْأَنْبِيَاءَ لَمْ يُوَرِّثُوا دِينَارًا وَلَا دِرْهَمًا وَرَّثُوا الْعِلْمَ فَمَنْ أَخَذَهُ أَخَذَ بِحَظٍّ وَافِرٍ
translation: Abu Darda reported: The Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings be upon him) said: Verily, the angels lower their wings in pleasure for the seeker of knowledge. The inhabitants of the heavens and the earth, even the fish in the depths of the water, seek forgiveness for the scholar. The superiority of the scholar over the worshiper is like the superiority of the moon over the stars. The scholars are the inheritors of the Prophets. The Prophets do not leave behind gold or silver coins, but rather they leave knowledge. Whoever takes it has taken an abundant share.

arabic: فَضْلُ الْعَالِمِ عَلَى الْعَابِدِ كَفَضْلِي عَلَى أَدْنَاكُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ وَأَهْلَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرَضِينَ حَتَّى النَّمْلَةَ فِي جُحْرِهَا وَحَتَّى الْحُوتَ لَيُصَلُّونَ عَلَى مُعَلِّمِ النَّاسِ الْخَيْرَ
translation: Abu Umamah reported: The Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings be upon him) said: The virtue of the scholar over the worshiper is like my virtue over the least of you. Verily Allah, His angels, the inhabitants of the heavens and the earth, even the ant in its hole and the fish in the sea send blessings upon the one who teaches people goodness.

arabic: مَنْ يُرِدْ اللَّهُ بِهِ خَيْرًا يُفَقِّهْهُ فِي الدِّينِ
translation: Mu’awiyah reported: The Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings be upon him) said: If Allah intends goodness for someone, He gives him understanding of the religion.

arabic: خَيْرُكُمْ إِسْلَامًا أَحَاسِنُكُمْ أَخْلَاقًا إِذَا فَقُهُوا
translation: Abu Huraira reported: The Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings be upon him) said: The best of you in Islam are those with the best character if they have understanding of the religion.

arabic: إِنَّ مَثَلَ مَا بَعَثَنِيَ اللَّهُ بِهِ مِنَ الْهُدَى وَالْعِلْمِ كَمَثَلِ غَيْثٍ أَصَابَ أَرْضًا فَكَانَتْ مِنْهَا طَائِفَةٌ طَيِّبَةٌ قَبِلَتْ الْمَاءَ فَأَنْبَتَتْ الْكَلَأَ وَالْعُشْبَ الْكَثِيرَ
translation: Abu Musa reported: The Prophet (peace and blessings be upon him) said: The guidance and knowledge Allah sent with me is like rain falling upon the earth. Some land absorbs the water and produces abundant vegetation, some retains the water benefiting people who drink from it, and some land neither holds water nor grows plants. This is the example of those who understand the religion and benefit from the knowledge Allah sent with me, and those who do not accept it.

arabic: لَا تَحَاسُدَ إِلَّا فِي اثْنَتَيْنِ رَجُلٌ آتَاهُ اللَّهُ الْقُرْآنَ فَهُوَ يَتْلُوهُ آنَاءَ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ
translation: Abu Huraira reported: The Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings be upon him) said: There is no envy except in two cases: a man whom Allah has given the Quran and he recites it day and night, and a man whom Allah has given wealth and he spends it in charity day and night.
Uthman ibn Affan reported: The Prophet (peace and blessings be upon him) said: The best of you are those who learn the Quran and teach it.

arabic: وَاللَّهِ لَأَنْ يَهْدِيَ اللَّهُ بِكَ رَجُلًا خَيْرٌ لَكَ مِنْ حُمْرِ النَّعَمِ
translation: Sahl ibn Sa'd reported: The Prophet (peace and blessings be upon him) said: By Allah, if Allah guides a man through you it is better for you than red camels.
Actions are judged by intentions.
Religion is sincere advice.

arabic: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ
translation: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should speak good or remain silent.

arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ
translation: A Muslim is the one from whose tongue and hands other Muslims are safe.

arabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّى يُحِبَّ لِأَخِيهِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِهِ
translation: None of you truly believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself.
The best among you are those with the best character.
Cleanliness is half of faith.
Whoever does not show mercy will not be shown mercy.
Make things easy and do not make them difficult.

arabic: تَبَسُّمُكَ فِي وَجْهِ أَخِيكَ لَكَ صَدَقَةٌ
translation: Your smile to your brother is charity.
Whoever remains silent is saved.
Righteousness is good character.
The best of people are those most beneficial to others.

arabic: مَنْ سَلَكَ طَرِيقًا يَلْتَمِسُ فِيهِ عِلْمًا سَهَّلَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِهِ طَرِيقًا إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ
translation: Whoever follows a path seeking knowledge, Allah will make a path to Paradise easy for him.
The best of you are those who learn the Quran and teach it.
Whoever cheats us is not one of us.

arabic: الْيَدُ الْعُلْيَا خَيْرٌ مِنَ الْيَدِ السُّفْلَى
translation: The upper hand is better than the lower hand.
Fear Allah wherever you are.
A believer is the mirror of another believer.
Modesty is part of faith.

arabic: مَنْ لَا يَشْكُرِ النَّاسَ لَا يَشْكُرِ اللَّهَ
translation: Whoever does not thank people does not thank Allah.
Allah is beautiful and loves beauty.

arabic: مَنْ صَلَّى عَلَيَّ وَاحِدَةً صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ عَشْرًا
translation: Whoever sends one blessing upon me, Allah sends ten blessings upon him.

arabic: مَنْ لَا يَرْحَمُ النَّاسَ لَا يَرْحَمُهُ اللَّهُ
translation: Allah will not show mercy to one who does not show mercy to people.
Removing harm from the road is charity.

arabic: السَّاعِي عَلَى الأَرْمَلَةِ وَالْمِسْكِينِ كَالْمُجَاهِدِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ
translation: The one who cares for widows and the poor is like a warrior in the cause of Allah.
Protect yourselves from the Fire even with half a date in charity.
Supplication is worship.
The best charity is giving water to drink.

arabic: الْمُؤْمِنُ الْقَوِيُّ خَيْرٌ وَأَحَبُّ إِلَى اللَّهِ
translation: The strong believer is better and more beloved to Allah than the weak believer.
The most beloved deeds to Allah are those done regularly even if small.
Whoever humbles himself for Allah, Allah will raise him.

arabic: مَنْ كَانَ فِي حَاجَةِ أَخِيهِ كَانَ اللَّهُ فِي حَاجَتِهِ
translation: Whoever fulfills the need of his brother, Allah will fulfill his need.
Spread السلام (peace) among yourselves.
Do not belittle any good deed.
A good word is charity.
Allah is gentle and loves gentleness.

arabic: مَنْ كَظَمَ غَيْظًا وَهُوَ قَادِرٌ عَلَى أَنْ يُنْفِذَهُ دَعَاهُ اللَّهُ
translation: Whoever suppresses anger while able to act upon it, Allah will call him on the Day of Resurrection.
Truthfulness leads to righteousness.
Beware of lying.

arabic: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الآخِرِ فَلْيُكْرِمْ ضَيْفَهُ
translation: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should honor his guest.
Righteousness never becomes obsolete.
Avoid the seven destructive sins.
Regret is repentance.
A person will be with whom he loves.
The best people are those most beneficial to people.
Supplication is worship.
Paradise lies beneath the feet of mothers.

arabic: الرفق ما كان في شيء إلا زانه
translation: Gentleness does not enter anything except that it beautifies it.
He who remains silent is saved.
